step_log.notes: SSDT GreenAi.DB.sqlproj fails on dotnet CLI (pre-existing, requires VS MSBuild) — not caused by this step
Additive only — method not yet called in handler. UserMembershipRecord uses int fields (consistent with existing Dapper records, no TypeHandler registered).
GetMembershipsAsync mock added to both success-path tests. Failure-path tests require no setup — handler exits before membership call.

step_log.description: Refactor LoginHandler to use membership model
notes: LoginHandler: GetMembershipsAsync called post-password-validation. 0 memberships→ACCOUNT_HAS_NO_TENANT, 1→JWT with membership.CustomerId, >1→RequiresCustomerSelection
LoginResponse: WithToken() and RequiresCustomerSelection() factories added. NeedsCustomerSelection bool discriminates cases. Non-nullable token fields preserve test compatibility.
LoginPage.razor: NeedsCustomerSelection guard added (TODO placeholder for customer selection page).
LanguageId read from membership.LanguageId but not yet embedded in JWT — deferred to Step 6 (GreenAiClaims + ICurrentUser).
JwtTokenService signature unchanged to avoid cascading changes to RefreshTokenHandler which has no LanguageId yet.

step_log.description: Add LanguageId to full auth flow (claim, ICurrentUser, JwtTokenService, LoginHandler, RefreshTokenHandler)
notes: GreenAiClaims.LanguageId = 'greenai:language_id' added
ICurrentUser.LanguageId: int property added
HttpContextCurrentUser: reads GreenAiClaims.LanguageId from principal
JwtTokenService.CreateToken: languageId int parameter added, embedded as claim
LoginHandler: passes membership.LanguageId to CreateToken
RefreshTokenHandler: passes languageId=1 (default) — gap: UserRefreshTokens has no LanguageId column yet, to be addressed in Step 7+
V006: ALTER TABLE UserRefreshTokens ADD LanguageId INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1
LanguageId persisted at login time (membership.LanguageId), rotated through refresh flow (record.LanguageId)
LANGUAGE_PLACEMENT locked decision now fully honoured end-to-end — LanguageId originates in UserCustomerMembership at login, persisted through token rotation without recalculation
RefreshTokenRecord gains LanguageId field — Dapper column order updated in FindValidRefreshToken.sql

step_log.description: SelectCustomer vertical slice — multi-tenant customer selection
notes: POST /api/auth/select-customer — requires authentication (IRequireAuthentication marker + .RequireAuthorization())
Handler reads UserId from ICurrentUser (never from client), verifies membership in UserCustomerMembership, issues JWT with LanguageId from membership row
ICurrentUser.Email added (reads ClaimTypes.Email from principal) — needed by JwtTokenService.CreateToken
MembershipRecord: CustomerId, LanguageId, DefaultProfileId — DefaultProfileId from LEFT JOIN Profiles
FindMembership.sql filters UserId AND CustomerId AND IsActive=1
SelectCustomerRepository.SaveRefreshToken.sql is co-located — no cross-feature SQL dependency

step_log.description: Remove Users.CustomerId; rewrite FindUserByEmail.sql as pure identity query
notes: Users.CustomerId FK dropped (dynamic FK discovery) and column removed in V007 (idempotent)
FindUserByEmail.sql rewritten: pure identity query — no JOIN, no CustomerId, no DefaultProfileId
LoginUserRecord: CustomerId and DefaultProfileId removed; fields: Id, Email, PasswordHash, PasswordSalt, FailedLoginCount, IsLockedOut
LoginHandler: user.DefaultProfileId replaced with new ProfileId(0) placeholder — Profile decision deferred to Step 11
AuthTestDataBuilder.InsertUserAsync: customerId param removed; INSERT no longer writes CustomerId column
LoginRepositoryTests: 2 profile-dependent FindByEmail tests deleted, 1 identity-only test added (net -1 = 31 total)
FindValidRefreshToken.sql NOT changed — reads CustomerId from UserRefreshTokens (not Users) — unaffected
Test count: 31 (was 32) — expected delta from deleted obsolete profile tests

step_log.description: Fix test infrastructure gaps: LanguageId in InsertRefreshTokenAsync + InsertUserCustomerMembershipAsync
notes: InsertTokenOptions.LanguageId added (default 1) — INSERT now includes LanguageId column
InsertRefreshTokenAsync: UserRefreshTokens INSERT updated to include LanguageId — matches V006 schema
InsertUserCustomerMembershipAsync(UserId, CustomerId, int languageId=1) added — inserts into UserCustomerMembership with IsActive=1
No production code changes

step_log.description: Add full test coverage for SelectCustomer feature
notes: SelectCustomerHandlerTests: 6 tests — Handle_ValidMembership_ReturnsToken, Handle_ValidMembership_SavesRefreshTokenWithMembershipLanguageId, Handle_ValidMembership_UsesUserIdFromCurrentUser, Handle_MembershipNotFound_ReturnsError, Handle_InactiveMembership_ReturnsError, Handle_MembershipNotFound_DoesNotSaveRefreshToken
SelectCustomerRepositoryTests: 7 tests — FindMembership (active, no profile, inactive, unknown user, wrong customer) + SaveRefreshToken (persists languageId, token retrievable)
CreateHandler helper extracted — removes jwt/currentUser boilerplate from every handler test
Naming pattern: MethodName_StateUnderTest_ExpectedBehavior applied throughout
AuthTestDataBuilder: comment added above InsertUserCustomerMembershipAsync documenting that LanguageId=1 default is test-only — production must always pass explicit LanguageId
No production code changes
